data.description: The RULESET_ID is currently extracted using grep + cut on the raw API response (line 235). This is fragile and can fail with non-trivial JSON or formatting changes. Use jq to parse the response: RULESET_ID=$(echo "$RULESET_RESPONSE" | jq -r '.id')
data.title: provision-ruleset.sh: use jq to extract RULESET_ID from API response instead of grep
